scope: Cycle 17: Bug hunt C16 (merlin_llm_adapter.gd + llm_adapter_prompts.gd) + BUGFIX-027/028 + 3rd GM few-shot example

bugs_found.description: echo_memory cross-run data (deaths_by_biome, dominant_factions_seen, total_runs) was NOT wired into LLM context despite C16 status claiming completion. build_narrative_context() did not extract echo_memory from meta. build_context_enrichment() did not format cross-run memory. Result: LLM had zero awareness of player's cross-run history despite data existing in save profile.
bugs_found.fix: build_narrative_context() now extracts echo_memory from meta and adds total_runs, deaths_in_biome, dominant_factions_seen to context dict. build_context_enrichment() formats these as narrative hints: veteran status, death memory, faction allegiance history.

bugs_found.description: tension_zone and convergence_zone from MOS (stored in run state by merlin_store.gd) were not injected into LLM narrative prompts. The old build_context_enrichment() only used hidden.tension (int), not the categorical tension_zone string. LLM had no awareness of MOS pacing.
bugs_found.fix: build_context_enrichment() now reads tension_zone and convergence_zone, maps zones to narrative pacing hints (FIN IMMINENTE for critical, Tension haute for high, Tension montante for rising).

overall_assessment: Cycle 17: Bug hunt C16 found 2 bugs (1 HIGH + 1 MEDIUM) — both cases where C16 status claimed code was done but code was never modified. Fixed both + added 3rd GM few-shot example. 28 total bugs fixed across 17 cycles.
